children.name: 1. Test Case ID: e73joq  - Undocumented HTTP status code      Received: 404     Documented: 414, 503, 401, 400, 431, 500, 429, 200, 412, 403  [404] Not Found:      `not found`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/rbac/registrations/cardano/11qYAYKxCrfVS_7TyWQHOg7hcvPapiMlrwIaaPcHURo

1. Test Case ID: Hvdc1F  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'array'      Schema at /properties/required:          {             "type": "array",             "description": "List or Roles required to access the resource.",             "items": {                 "type": "string",                 "maxLength": 100,                 "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"             },             "maxItems": 100         }      Value:          null  [403] Forbidden:      `{"id":"241e4b3a-7b67-4b7b-a352-ec1ad58110d4","msg":"Your request was not successful because your authentication credentials do not have the required roles for the requested resource.","required":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/rbac/role0_chain_root/0x00000000000000000000000000000000

Test Case ID: Srlpn6  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'array'      Schema at /properties/required:          {             "type": "array",             "description": "List or Roles required to access the resource.",             "items": {                 "type": "string",                 "maxLength": 100,                 "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"             },             "maxItems": 100         }      Value:          null  [403] Forbidden:      `{"id":"2db932df-4067-4e01-ac2c-de3cd958ead1","msg":"Your request was not successful because your authentication credentials do not have the required roles for the requested resource.","required":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/rbac/chain_root/stake_test1uqehkck0lajq8gr28t9uxnuvgcqrc6070x3k9r8048z8y5gssrtvn

1. Test Case ID: z42DAu  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'object'      Schema at /properties/sentry/allOf/0:          {             "type": "object",             "description": "Frontend configuration for Sentry.",             "required": [                 "dsn"             ],             "properties": {                 "dsn": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "The Data Source Name (DSN) for Sentry.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^https?://"                 },                 "release": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "A version of the code deployed to an environment.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"                 },             // Output truncated...         }      Value:          null  [200] OK:      `{"sentry":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema
